shortDescription: ETS · Internet-based · USA admissions focus · 2-year validity

policyAlert.summary: Verify TOEFL iBT exam fee and dates on the official booking portal before quoting. Coaching fee is separate. Never guarantee a score.

alert.title: USA admissions focus — not Canada PR
alert.body: TOEFL iBT is widely used for USA F-1 and graduate admission. IRCC does not accept TOEFL for Canadian immigration — redirect PR leads to IELTS or CELPIP.

about.label: Description
about.value: Structured TOEFL iBT preparation with trainer-led classes, homework, and progress tracking.

about.label: Ideal for
about.value: USA F-1 and programs requiring TOEFL iBT. Confirm university minimum before enrollment.

about.label: Delivery
about.value: Classroom or hybrid per branch schedule. Materials per program policy.

about.label: After course
about.value: Exam guidance, score tracking, retake recommendation, and handoff to admissions/visa team when target met.

eligibility.criterion: Diagnostic or prior score on file

redFlagsBanner: If attendance drops or mocks stay far below target, pause exam booking and reset the study plan.

redFlags.title: Unrealistic target
redFlags.description: Large gap expected in very short timeline.
redFlags.fix: Reset timeline or recommend appropriate program

redFlags.title: Chronic absenteeism
redFlags.fix: Counselor call, batch change, or pause

faqs.a: No. IRCC does not accept TOEFL for immigration.
iBT is the standard for most universities. Essentials has limited acceptance — confirm each institution.
Student pays ETS directly. Coaching fee is separate.
ETS may combine best section scores from valid tests within 2 years — confirm university policy.

compliance: Never guarantee exam scores or bands
Separate coaching fee from exam registration fee
Signed enrollment agreement before batch start
Record diagnostic and mock scores on client file
proTips: Set target in writing at enrollment
Confirm correct test/module for student pathway
Book official exam only when mocks support readiness
postApproval: Collect official score report when released
Update client record for admissions / visa team
Plan retake or booster if below target

timeline.title: Exam booking, test day prep, score follow-up

staffNotes.author: Coaching team
staffNotes.text: Use this specimen for counselor training on TOEFL iBT.

dos: Keep exam fee separate on quotes
mistakes: Visa team not updated when target met

quiz.question: Counselors must never for TOEFL iBT:
quiz.explanation: Score guarantees are prohibited for all coaching programs.

quiz.question: TOEFL iBT coaching fee and official exam fee should be:
quiz.explanation: Coaching and exam fees must be quoted separately.

quiz.question: Before enrollment in TOEFL iBT, FLC recommends:
quiz.explanation: Diagnostic and target alignment are required before batch start.

quiz.question: Minimum attendance standard for TOEFL iBT is typically:
quiz.explanation: Review attendance when it drops below 80%.

quiz.question: TOEFL iBT is most commonly required for:
quiz.explanation: TOEFL is widely used for US admissions.

quiz.question: TOEFL iBT is accepted by IRCC for Canadian PR:
quiz.explanation: IRCC does not accept TOEFL for immigration.

quiz.question: Enrollment agreement for TOEFL iBT should be signed:
quiz.explanation: Signed agreement before classes begin.

quiz.question: Before advising official exam booking for TOEFL iBT:
quiz.explanation: Readiness should be based on mock performance.

quiz.question: When attendance drops below 80% in TOEFL iBT:
quiz.explanation: Attendance issues require counselor follow-up.

quiz.question: Official score report for TOEFL iBT should be:
options: Logged on client file and shared with visa/admissions team
quiz.explanation: Score reports must be documented and handed off when relevant.

quiz.question: TOEFL iBT is delivered:
quiz.explanation: iBT is the standard internet-based format.

quiz.question: TOEFL score validity is generally:
quiz.explanation: Two years from test date.

quiz.question: TOEFL coaching fee and ETS exam fee should be:
quiz.explanation: Separate fees on all quotes.

quiz.question: A student with unrealistic target timeline for TOEFL iBT should:
quiz.explanation: Unrealistic timelines must be corrected before enrollment.

quiz.question: Sales promising a guaranteed band/score for TOEFL iBT is:
quiz.explanation: Never guarantee exam outcomes.

quiz.question: Retake planning for TOEFL iBT should be based on:
quiz.explanation: Retakes need structured gap analysis.

quiz.question: Visa/admissions team handoff for TOEFL iBT happens when:
options: Target met and official report available
quiz.explanation: Hand off when target is met and documentation is on file.

quiz.question: MyBest scores (TOEFL) allow:
options: Combining best section scores from valid tests within 2 years
quiz.explanation: MyBest combines best section scores per ETS rules.

quiz.question: A Canada PR lead should be directed to:
quiz.explanation: IRCC does not accept TOEFL for PR.

quiz.question: Before TOEFL booking, readiness is assessed via:
quiz.explanation: University minimums vary — confirm before booking.
